PostToolUse.description: Run ruff on edited Python files

hooks.command: cd /Users/ravichahal/projects/enterprise-agent-learning && ruff check src/ tests/ --quiet 2>&1 | head -20 || true

PostToolUse.description: Run mypy type check after Python edits

hooks.command: cd /Users/ravichahal/projects/enterprise-agent-learning && python -m mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary 2>&1 | tail -5 || true
